fields.title: beads renderer: support dep add/remove/cycles and comments
fields.description:
Port the old stash changes (from pre-tau-i3c consolidation) into the unified tau extension's beads renderer.

DoD:
- bd dep add/remove/cycles render as a compact block
- bd comment/comments render as a compact block
- ensureJsonFlag/quiet handling updated
- no crashes when json is empty

Source reference: stash@{0} (old extensions/beads/src/index.ts)
fields.close_reason: Ported renderer support into extensions/tau/src/beads for dep add/remove/cycles and comment/comments
